title: Ricochet Wins First Two Defenses Of AEW National Title On ROH Final Battle & Collision
summary: Ricochet's first two tests as AEW National Champion proved to be successful as he emerged victorious at ROH Final Battle and "AEW Collision."

title: Mercedes Mone Successfully Defends AEW TBS Title For 24th Time In Collision Victory
summary: Mercedes Mone successfully defends her AEW TBS Championship for the 24th time thanks to a win over Leila Grey.
